channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Pentagon let CBP use anti-drone laser before FAA closed El Paso airspace, AP sources say
item.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”

item.title: FBI combs desert terrain for clues in Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance
Few leads in Guthrie investigation after 11 days, yet cases often break unexpectedly
